title: PSI Candidate Information Bulletin — Oregon Construction Contractors
description: Official PSI exam blueprint covering format, content areas, and passing criteria for the Oregon CCB exam.

title: Oregon CCB Pre-License Education Requirements
description: Official CCB page describing the 16-hour pre-license training requirement.

title: ORS Chapter 701 — Construction Contractors
description: Oregon Revised Statutes governing construction contractor licensing, bonds, and enforcement.

title: ORS 701.305 — Written Contract Requirements for Residential Contractors
description: Oregon statute specifying when a written contract is required for residential construction work and what it must contain, including the CCB license number, price, dates, and right-of-rescission notice.

title: ORS 701.310 — Additional Contract Disclosures
description: Oregon statute detailing required bond and insurance disclosures that must appear in residential construction contracts.

title: OAR 812-009 — CCB Administrative Rules: Licensing and Conduct
description: Oregon Administrative Rules promulgated by the CCB governing contractor conduct, complaint procedures, and enforcement actions.

title: Oregon CCB Specialty Licenses — Lead-Based Paint
description: Official CCB page describing lead-based paint specialty licensing requirements for contractors performing covered renovation work.

title: Oregon Health Authority — Contractors and Painters (Lead RRP)
description: Official OHA overview of Oregon lead-based paint renovation requirements, certification, and program administration roles.

title: Oregon DEQ Asbestos Information
description: Official DEQ asbestos program overview, including health risk summary and compliance responsibilities.

title: Oregon DEQ Asbestos Information for Contractors and Businesses
description: Official DEQ guidance on asbestos abatement licensing/certification and business registration requirements.

title: OAR Chapter 340, Division 248 — Asbestos Requirements
description: Oregon Administrative Rules for asbestos survey, abatement, handling, and notification requirements.

title: CCB Relevant Statutes — Lead-Based Paint (PDF)
description: CCB-published compilation of lead-based paint related ORS and OAR citations used for contractor licensing and enforcement context.

title: EPA Renovation, Repair and Painting Program for Contractors
description: Federal explanatory resource describing RRP scope and contractor responsibilities; used for context only alongside Oregon authorities.
